close_reason: All child tasks are closed and landed on feat/more-om.
description:
Practical backlog summary anchor: **Tier 1 → Completion markers and completed-observation tracking**.

Backlog detail: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 5. Completion markers and completed-observation lifecycle**.

Implementation context:
- current state shape lives in `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts` and `src/state.ts`
- observe/reflect lifecycle is driven from `src/engine.ts` and `src/agents.ts`
- completion semantics are currently mostly implicit in observation text plus `currentTask` / `suggestedResponse`
- injected rendering path is `src/engine.ts` (`buildObservationContext`) and prompt guidance is in `src/prompts.ts`

What this epic should establish:
- explicit planned / active / blocked / completed / abandoned-or-superseded semantics
- durable preservation of completion state through reflection and task-state updates
- no regression back to vague summaries that hide whether work is done

Useful references:
- backlog doc Mastra refs for section 5 (`observer-agent.ts`, `reflector-agent.ts`, `markers.ts`, `markers.test.ts`)
- local tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__`

Keep this scoped to the single-session pi OM model; do not turn it into a broader provenance/threading project.
title: Add completion markers and completed-observation tracking
